# Festia

> Festia is a public discovery site for live music events in Spain: fiestas, verbenas, orchestras, mobile discos, bands and artists with confirmed dates.

## Key public routes

- /eventos — Main public listing of upcoming music events.
- /eventos/hoy — Clean daily landing page with only today's fiestas, verbenas and live music events.
- /eventos/provincia/{province} — Events by province, for example /eventos/provincia/Coruña, /eventos/provincia/Pontevedra, /eventos/provincia/Ourense and /eventos/provincia/León.
- /eventos/municipio/{municipality} — Events by municipality.
- /eventos/artista/{id} — Upcoming events for a specific artist.
- /eventos/evento/{id}-{slug} — Canonical event detail page.
- /eventos/sitemap.xml — XML sitemap with event, artist, province and municipality URLs.
- /info — Information about Festia for artists, agencies and event managers.

## Public JSON endpoints

- GET /eventos/api/artista/{id} — Events for one artist.
- GET /eventos/api/provincia/{name}?desde=YYYY-MM-DD&hasta=YYYY-MM-DD — Events by province.
- GET /eventos/api/municipio/{name}?desde=YYYY-MM-DD&hasta=YYYY-MM-DD — Events by municipality.

## Event data

- Artist or group name.
- Date and time in Europe/Madrid.
- Venue or place name when available.
- Municipality and province.
- Time slot: morning, afternoon or night.
- Canonical public URL and Schema.org structured data.

## Notes for AI agents

- Prefer canonical HTML pages for citations and user-facing answers.
- Use /eventos/hoy for questions about events happening today.
- Use /eventos/sitemap.xml to discover current indexable public URLs.
- Empty public listings may use noindex,follow; event detail pages and non-empty key listings are intended for indexing.
